channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Ireland upstage world champions India to win T20 series at home
item.description: Ireland won the second T20 by one run over India, who did not give a debut to teen sensation Sooryavanshi.

item.title: Canada score late to beat South Africa and reach last 16 at World Cup 2026
item.description: Stephen Eustaquio scores in stoppage time as Canada wins first knockout match in a World Cup.

item.title: Protesters in Serbia doubt Vucic resignation will bring change
item.description: Thousands of protesters gathered in Serbia's Kraljevo, dismissing Aleksandar Vucic's pledge to resign.

item.title: Pope Leo prays for Venezuela’s recovery after deadly quakes
item.description: Pope Leo expressed solidarity with Venezuelans after two deadly earthquakes claimed the lives of at least 1,400.

item.title: Israel kills four Palestinians in Gaza as attacks on tents continue
item.description: Israeli forces restrict Palestinian worshippers at Al-Aqsa Mosque and block the call to prayer at the Ibrahimi Mosque.

item.title: Hope of finding more Venezuela quake survivors fades despite late rescues
item.description: Those rescued include 60-year-old woman trapped for 86 hours, as tens of thousands still reported missing.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Top matches to watch in the Round of 32 knockout stage
item.description: We have finally reached the knockout stages of the 2026 World Cup - here is Al Jazeera's guide to the best matchups.

item.title: Gaza’s displaced families face worsening living conditions
item.description: Rats infest Gaza's camps, where sewage and tents full of waste spread disease as families live without sanitation.

item.title: Can the ICJ help end the war in the eastern DRC?
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo takes Rwanda to the International Court of Justice.

item.title: Israeli forces bulldoze olive groves in the occupied West Bank
item.description: Israeli forces bulldozed olive trees in the village of Zububa, west of Jenin in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Starmer couldn’t master the media. Can Burnham?
item.description: Keir Starmer’s rapid fall from power and Britain’s revolving door of leaders.

item.title: US and Iran trade strikes days after peace agreement
item.description: Just days after signing a memorandum of understanding, the US and Iran have traded strikes.

item.title: Serbia’s protesters press on even after Vucic promises to step aside
item.description: Demonstrators doubt the president is truly surrendering power after 12 years in charge.

item.title: Why do reports of domestic abuse increase during World Cups?
item.description: Why do reports of domestic abuse increase during World Cups?

item.title: In Lebanon, framework agreement signed with Israel spurs protest, criticism
item.description: Anger over deal that does not force Israeli troops to withdraw from occupied land after months of deadly attacks.

item.title: The aftermath of Venezuela’s deadly earthquake
item.description: The search for survivors continues in Venezuela after a powerful earthquake left hundreds dead and thousands missing.

item.title: The match that changed the World Cup forever
item.description: One of football's biggest scandals changed the World Cup forever.

item.title: Drone captures ongoing rescue efforts after Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: Drone footage from Venezuela's La Guaira shows widespread destruction after twin earthquakes devastated the region.

item.title: Louisiana primary win puts Trump endorsee Letlow on path to US Senate
item.description: Trump waded into race to defeat incumbent Bill Cassidy, a Republican and critic of Trump's actions following 2020 vote.

item.title: Russell beats Verstappen at Austrian Grand Prix to boost F1 title hopes
item.description: George Russell's victory over Max Verstappen further reduces teammate Kimi Antonelli’s lead in the drivers' title race.

item.title: Israel strikes Lebanon, testing days-old peace deal
item.description: Hezbollah calls the deal a surrender as Israeli forces stay put and continue striking the south.

item.title: LIVE: South Africa 0-1 Canada – Canada into last 16 of FIFA World Cup
item.description: Live updates, analyses and text commentary as South Africa face cohosts Canada in first knockout match in Los Angeles.

item.title: Iraq arrests senior officials in anti-corruption raids
item.description: Iraqi security forces arrested several politicians, lawmakers and senior officials in dawn raids across Baghdad.

item.title: Three firefighters killed in US wildfires along Colorado–Utah border
item.description: The US has seen a harsh wildfire season this year, with prolonged droughts and dry conditions fuelling blazes.

item.title: Ben Stokes, England test captain, to retire from international cricket
item.description: England test captain Ben Stokes will retire from international cricket after the ongoing test match against New Zealand.
